steps.title: Find the slope of the given line
steps.content: Rewrite in slope-intercept form: $3y+12x=5 → y=-4x+5/3$. So the slope of the given line is $-4$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals, so the slope of the perpendicular line is $1/4$. The answer is 0.25.
